title: Bodkin Boats League
description:
Modpack used for the Bodkin Boats League, an ice boat racing event.

The modpack features Bodkin Boats. Which changes how boats data is sent over the network and adds custom boat collisions, power-ups as well as the race  system used for the event.
body:
Modpack used for the Bodkin Boats League, an ice boat racing event.

The modpack features Bodkin Boats. Which changes how boats data is sent over the network and adds custom boat collisions, power-ups as well as the race  system used for the event.


[Click here to see the Website for infomation on upcomming events](https://cablepost.co.uk/bodkin-boats-league/?from=modrinth)
